visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long black hair, wearing a white t-shirt covered in yellow and blue cartoon blobs, smiles at the camera while making a peace sign in a hotel room. A person sits on a bed behind her. (2) POV shot of two large suitcases (yellow Rimowa and pink) being rolled along a Japanese urban sidewalk past a Burger King near Sugamo Station. (3) Night view of a FamilyMart convenience store on a quiet street corner. (4) The exterior of the 'Winco' building is shown, featuring a vending machine and three electric scooters parked out front. A small boy in a brown jacket runs near the entrance. (5) Interior tour of the accommodation starting from a narrow hallway. A door opens to reveal a clean white toilet. The bathroom features a modern white vanity with a large lit mirror, a bathtub, and marble-patterned walls. (6) The camera pans through the main living area, showing three beds, a small elevated tatami-style 'washitsu' nook, a green sofa, and a wall-mounted TV. Two large open suitcases sit on a luggage rack. (7) The woman returns to the frame, putting her finger to her lips in a 'shush' gesture and then smiling widely, as the boy lies on a bed in the background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 一晚只要5000. (2) [Subtitle]: 巢鴨車站北口出 走路約3分. (3) [Subtitle]: 民宿旁邊就有全家. (4) [Subtitle]: 樓下有販賣機. (5) [Subtitle]: 還滑板車 非常方便. (6) [Subtitle]: 一進房門 左邊是廁所. (7) [Subtitle]: 右邊是浴室. (8) [Variety]: 超大洗手台. (9) [Variety]: 有浴缸. (10) [Variety]: 再一面鏡子. (11) [Subtitle]: 一張床. (12) [Subtitle]: 兩張床. (13) [Subtitle]: 小和室. (14) [Subtitle]: 沙發 電視. (15) [Subtitle]: 打開兩個大行李箱 也是沒問題. (16) [Variety]: 有窗有採光. (17) [Variety]: 重點是. (18) [Variety]: 過年到處都很貴的期間. (19) [Subtitle]: 一晚只要5000. (20) [Subtitle]: 可以睡4-6個人喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 small boy, and 1 adult male seen in the background of the room.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman in her 30s with long black hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a colorful character pattern and beige shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern Japanese apartment-style hotel room with light wood accents, white bedding, and a small tatami area. Outside shows a clean Japanese street near a train station and a convenience store.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced Japanese female pop vocals begin with a steady acoustic guitar strumming and a light drum beat. A female voice speaks in an energetic, high-pitched Chinese tone, introducing a hotel price. (2) Ambient city sound is barely audible under the music as the narrator describes the walk from Sugamo Station. (3) The music continues consistently as the narrator lists nearby amenities like FamilyMart and vending machines. (4) A subtle pop sound effect occurs when a text graphic appears. The narrator's voice maintains a cheerful, narrative flow while touring the bathroom. (5) As the camera pans through the bedroom area, the narrator's tone becomes more excited, emphasizing the space and price. (6) The vocal delivery slows slightly for the final 'shush' moment, then resumes a warm, laughing tone to conclude the review.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Logistics -> Exterior Features -> Interior Tour -> Value Proposition
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a travel recommendation and review of a family-friendly hotel (Minpaku) in Tokyo, highlighting its proximity to transit, local convenience, spacious interior, and exceptional value during peak holiday pricing.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator provides specific pricing, location details, and a positive tour of the accommodation named 'Winco'.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a fast-paced 'short-form' editing style typical of TikTok or Reels, using on-screen text to summarize spoken points for quick consumption.
